textgroup.text: Fields maintained by direct API connection
Connection successful. You have read-only access to the HOVI database
Connection successful. You have write access to the following organizations:
This product or form is no longer available
The end date must be after the start date
One ore more participating products or a selected form is not available
The event name must be filled for at least one translation
Cannot delete or depublish items that are synchronized from the CROHO register.
Cannot delete or depublish items, there are other other items that refer to it.
Cannot publish this product because there are unresolved errors.
Your selection contains errors which must be fixed before publishing
No references from items of type '' to this item have been found
This field is managed outside of the HOVI editor
The education product has been published
The following item could be published - please open them and check for issues:
Are you sure you want to delete this item? This action cannot be undone.

Are you sure you want to delete the translations for the following languages?
All the translations of these languages will be lost.
Are you sure you want to depublish this item?
Are you sure you want to publish the selection?
There are changes you haven't saved yet. Are you sure you want to close this screen? All unsaved changes will be lost.
Are you sure you want to revert to the published version? All your changes will be lost.
Modified with respect to the published version

There was an error publishing your changes to the HOVI Database.
Your changes have been saved so you can retry later.
If this problem persists, please contact us
The list of fields that can are edited with the editor has been updated.
Items can be added and deleted with the editor
Fields that can be edited with the editor
Fully maintained with an API connection (read-only in the editor)
Partially editable in the editor (choose the editable fields)
Show the 'userKey' field (for debugging your API-connection)
There are unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to close this screen?
Are you sure you want to update the list of fields that are maintained with the editor? Make sure no users are currently editing any item!
Other requirements for admission and eligibility
This is a small-scale intensive educational progran (BKKI)
No existing product of type 'Croho Program' was found with the CROHO code ''.
No existing product of type 'Croho Program' was found with the CROHO code '' at location ''.
Please select at least one language
Are you sure you want to delete this product form?

Are you sure you want to perform the following actions?
You might need to revert all edits to undo these actions.
Credits may have only one decimal
The product name differs from the CROHO name
The requirement '' appears more than once
The main location must be filled if any of the percentages for distance learning are less than 100%.
The accreditation by NVAO is missing (a CROHO-program or variant is always accredited by the NVAO). It will be added automatically when published.
Prices may have only up to two decimals
Upcoming three program starts with deadlines and end date
Number of course for each type of study route
Yearly costs for the upcoming study year (per type)
Yearly costs for the current study year (per type)
You haven't setup any dossiers yet
No items were found for the selected organisation
No products matching the filters were found
Updating dossiers for a product products
The HOVI Editor application was developed by WebHare bv for Studiekeuze123.
References from the following items will be removed if you depublish the selection
There are events that refer to this item as their location. Fix or depublish those events first
There are locations that refer to this item as a parent location. Fix or depublish those locations first
There are products that refer to this item as their main location. Fix or depublish those products first
There are references from items that are still in draft. Publish or revert these drafts first
Because the default legal fees are used, a legal fee for full-time cannot be added.

The field 'Minimum score' has an invalid value. The following types of values are allowed:
- An whole number, from 0 to 1000
- A value with single decimal, 0.0 to 9.9 (with a dot in the middle)
- A character (A, B or C)
- A character (A, B or C) followed by a number (1 or 2)
The programs in this studyroute are only applicable if followed on one of the institutes below
This studyroute only applies to these programs
Are you sure you want to delete this default value?
Are you sure you want to update all the published items that use this default value?
This default value is used in the following items. Are you sure you want to remove it?
CROHO programs are synchronized from the CROHO register, and cannot be added manually.
Choose the metatype of this product
Choose the type of this product
With this change you connect this product to another Croho program. Are you sure?
No locations of type 'Course Location' or 'External Location' are available yet.
The values for the different forms are not the same. Are you sure you want the use the values for form '' for all forms?
for all product forms at once
This program is also selected in another study route for the same organizations
